meanings.definition: hold back, as of a danger or an enemy; check the expansion or influence of
examples: Check the growth of communism in South East Asia
Turn back the tide of communism

meanings.definition: keep under control; keep in check

examples: the scientists held off announcing their results until they repeated the experiment

meanings.definition: secure and keep for possible future use or application
examples: The landlord retained the security deposit
I reserve the right to disagree

meanings.definition: hold back; keep from being perceived by others
